title: AuditReady
intent: Evidence collection, control mapping, and readiness scoring for SOC2/ISO/GDPR
requirements: frameworks module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
controls module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
evidence module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
scoring module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
gaps module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
remediation module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
